data.title: debug-everything: post-compaction resume forgets to invoke /dso:fix-bug skill, fixes bugs directly
data.description:
## Incident Overview

After context compaction in long debug-everything sessions, the orchestrator resumes bug-fix mode but forgets the user instruction to always invoke /dso:fix-bug skill. Instead, the orchestrator investigates and fixes bugs directly, bypassing the required skill workflow (TDD discipline, scoring, sub-agent dispatch).

## Observed Behavior
- User explicitly instructed: 'Make sure that you are using the /dso:fix-bug skill on every bug. Do not investigate and fix yourself. You are an orchestrator.'
- After compaction, session summary preserves the instruction in 'User instructions' section
- But orchestrator still occasionally investigates inline or skips /dso:fix-bug invocation

## Expected Behavior
Every bug fix in debug-everything sessions MUST go through /dso:fix-bug skill invocation, even after compaction.

## Root Cause Hypothesis
COMPACTION_RESUME fence in debug-everything SKILL.md may not sufficiently reinforce the fix-bug skill requirement.
